form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when second over 435m at this track. That followed a win two back in 24.45 beating Dr. Maverick over 435m at this track. Hard to have this time.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 515m at Sandown beaten 9 lengths (29.98) behind Lamia Nonna Mim in a R/A FIN on April 16. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Turned head and visibly eased in home straight.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at his last couple of starts, most recently at The Meadows over 525m. Others hold stronger claims.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 4 lengths in a Grade 4/5 last start at this track, recording an exceptional 28.67 over the 510m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (30.01) at Sandown. Worth including.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when second (24.73) over 435m at this track. Drawn wide. Looks tested in this line-up.
